hero.subtitle: Science-backed biological & organic agricultural solutions that enhance crop productivity, improve soil health, and empower every farmer with sustainable technology.

common_values.foliar_spray_3_5ml_l_water_repeat_every_: Foliar spray: 3-5ml/L water. Repeat every 7-10 days.
common_values.foliar_spray_2g_l_water_at_early_larval_: Foliar spray: 2g/L water at early larval stage.
common_values.apply_5kg_acre_before_sowing_mix_with_or: Apply 5kg/acre before sowing. Mix with organic manure for best results.

bio_insecticides.name: Bio Insecticides
bio_insecticides.desc: Advanced biological insecticides and fungicides for eco-friendly pest and disease management.

bio_pesticides.name: Bio Pesticides
bio_pesticides.desc: Eco-friendly pest management solutions derived from natural organisms and botanical extracts.

biostimulants.name: Biostimulants
biostimulants.desc: Natural plant growth simulators and rhizosphere activators derived from organic sources for superior crop performance.

organic_nutrients.name: Organic Nutrients
organic_nutrients.desc: OMRI-certified organic nutrient solutions for sustainable agriculture and premium produce.

specialty_products.name: Specialty Products
specialty_products.desc: Innovative solutions for specific agricultural challenges — soil health, water management, and post-harvest.

micronutrients.name: Micronutrients
micronutrients.desc: Balanced mixture of essential micronutrients (Fe, Mn, Zn, Cu, B) for optimal plant health and high yields.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: 60+ innovative biological and organic agricultural solutions across 5 categories.

bf-001.name: AT ORGO NB
bf-001.description: High-potency Nitrogen Fixing Bacteria (Azotobacter spp.) that provides atmospheric nitrogen directly to plants. Also available with Acetobacter spp., Azospirillum spp. and Rhizobium spp.

company.vision: To become India's most trusted agri-biotech company, empowering every farmer with sustainable, science-backed solutions for a food-secure future.
company.mission: We develop and deliver innovative biological and organic agricultural inputs that enhance crop productivity, improve soil health, and promote sustainable farming practices — making advanced agri-technology accessible to every farmer.

home.about_h2: Pioneering Sustainable Agriculture from Gujarat to All of India
home.about_lead: Founded in 2026 in Valsad, Gujarat, Jay Agritech Pvt. Ltd. is on a mission to revolutionize Indian agriculture through innovative biological solutions.
home.about_p1: We combine cutting-edge microbial technology with deep agricultural expertise to create products that work — for the farmer, for the crop, and for the environment.
home.solutions_subtitle: From soil to harvest — integrated biological solutions for every stage of crop growth
home.why_subtitle: What sets us apart in the world of agricultural innovation
home.growth_p1: Our integrated 4-step approach to transforming agriculture — combining soil science, biological nutrition, eco-safe protection, and growth optimization into one cohesive system.
home.success_subtitle: See how Jay Agritech products are making a measurable difference across Indian farms
home.knowledge_subtitle: Expert articles, guides, and seasonal advisories for modern farmers
home.partner_h2: Grow Your Business with Jay Agritech
home.partner_p1: Join our expanding network of dealers, distributors, and export partners. Access premium products, marketing support, and competitive margins.
